ScenarioName_ZH: 基础钓鱼邮件诈骗
Description: Generic phishing email asks users to verify their account via a link.
Description_ZH: 通用钓鱼邮件诱导用户点击链接验证账号。

ScenarioName_ZH: 员工随意点击可疑链接
Description: Users click unknown links without checking the destination.
Description_ZH: 员工未核实链接目标即随意点击未知链接。

ScenarioName_ZH: 伪造供应商发票邮件
Description: Finance or admin staff receive fake invoice emails from bogus suppliers.
Description_ZH: 财务或行政人员收到伪装成供应商的虚假发票邮件。

ScenarioName_ZH: 简单仿冒登录页面凭据窃取
Description: A phishing email directs staff to a fake but obviously poor login page.
Description_ZH: 钓鱼邮件将员工引导至明显粗糙的仿冒登录页面以窃取凭据。

ScenarioName_ZH: 钓鱼攻击未上报处置
Description: Staff spot suspicious emails but are unsure how to report them.
Description_ZH: 员工发现可疑邮件却不知如何上报。

ScenarioName_ZH: 电话社会工程攻击
Description: Callers pretend to be IT support asking for temporary passwords.
Description_ZH: 攻击者伪装成IT支持人员致电员工索取临时口令。

ScenarioName_ZH: 恶意附件执行导致恶意软件植入
Description: User opens an attachment that attempts to drop basic malware.
Description_ZH: 用户打开附件触发基础恶意软件植入。

ScenarioName_ZH: 弱口令使用问题
Description: Users choose simple or reused passwords for internal systems.
Description_ZH: 员工为内部系统设置简单或重复使用的口令。

ScenarioName_ZH: 口令明文书写外露
Description: Passwords are written on sticky notes near desks or screens.
Description_ZH: 员工将口令写在便利贴上贴于桌边或屏幕旁。

ScenarioName_ZH: 部门共享账号使用问题
Description: Teams share single logins for shared mailboxes or apps.
Description_ZH: 团队共用同一账号登录共享邮箱或应用。

ScenarioName_ZH: 离职人员账号未及时注销
Description: Accounts for staff who left months ago are still enabled.
Description_ZH: 已离职数月的员工账号仍处于启用状态。

ScenarioName_ZH: 账号无登录失败锁定机制
Description: Accounts do not lock after many failed login attempts.
Description_ZH: 账号多次登录失败后不会自动锁定。

ScenarioName_ZH: 云管理后台缺乏额外身份验证
Description: Cloud admin portals only require a password with no extra checks.
Description_ZH: 云管理门户仅需口令即可登录，无任何额外身份验证。

ScenarioName_ZH: VPN远程访问未启用多因素认证
Description: Remote VPN access relies only on passwords and is widely used.
Description_ZH: VPN远程访问仅依赖口令且被广泛使用。

ScenarioName_ZH: 重要数据未分类分级
Description: Teams store information without any sensitivity labels.
Description_ZH: 团队存储信息时未添加任何敏感度标签。

ScenarioName_ZH: 敏感文件存于未加密终端
Description: Staff keep small datasets of personal data on unencrypted laptops.
Description_ZH: 员工将少量个人数据存储在未加密的笔记本电脑上。

ScenarioName_ZH: 云存储默认生成公开共享链接
Description: Cloud sharing links are sometimes created with 'anyone with the link' access.
Description_ZH: 云存储有时生成"任何人均可访问"的共享链接。

ScenarioName_ZH: 数据副本分散存于非受管设备
Description: The same spreadsheets exist on multiple unmanaged devices.
Description_ZH: 相同电子表格散存于多台非受管设备上。

ScenarioName_ZH: 使用未加密U盘传输数据
Description: Staff use standard USB sticks to move data between home and office.
Description_ZH: 员工使用普通U盘在家与办公室间传输数据。

ScenarioName_ZH: 共享文件夹权限过于宽泛
Description: Shared network folders grant 'everyone' read access by default.
Description_ZH: 共享网络文件夹默认向所有人开放读取权限。

ScenarioName: Backups Stored on Shared Drive Only
ScenarioName_ZH: 备份仅存于共享网盘缺乏保护
Description: Backups are stored as simple copies on a shared drive without protection.
Description_ZH: 备份仅以简单副本形式存于共享网盘，缺乏保护措施。

ScenarioName_ZH: 非必要管理端口对内网开放
Description: Non-critical servers expose RDP/SSH to the internal network without justification.
Description_ZH: 非关键服务器无故对内网开放RDP/SSH管理端口。

ScenarioName_ZH: 网络设备使用出厂默认口令
Description: Printers and minor network devices use factory default credentials.
Description_ZH: 打印机及小型网络设备仍使用出厂默认凭据。

ScenarioName_ZH: 访客Wi-Fi口令强度不足
Description: Guest Wi-Fi uses a simple password shared widely over time.
Description_ZH: 访客Wi-Fi使用长期广泛共享的简单口令。

ScenarioName_ZH: 内部网络未进行区域隔离
Description: User PCs and servers share the same network segment.
Description_ZH: 用户终端与服务器处于同一网络区段。

ScenarioName_ZH: 操作系统补丁更新滞后
Description: Some endpoints run OS versions that have not been patched for several months.
Description_ZH: 部分终端运行数月未更新补丁的操作系统版本。

ScenarioName_ZH: 物联网设备接入缺乏安全审查
Description: Smart TVs or cameras are connected without security review.
Description_ZH: 智能电视或摄像头未经安全审查即接入网络。

ScenarioName_ZH: 边界路由器运行停止支持的固件
Description: Internet edge router runs out-of-support firmware with known issues.
Description_ZH: 互联网边界路由器运行已停止支持且存在已知漏洞的固件。
